prestazioni: Crank the 3.0L TFSI V6 (engine code: **CWGD**) to 550 HP / 550 lb-ft via **APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash** with **034 Motorsport high-flow downpipe** (catless, 3.5" diameter) and **CTS Turbo FMIC upgrade** (1200g/s airflow capacity) paired with **MagnaFlow 20246 cat-back exhaust** (dual 3.5" polished tips, resonated for cabin refinement).

Swap the stock **ZF 8HP70** transmission for a **034 Motorsport Stage 2+ TCU tune** with **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch** (ceramic-metallic, 800 lb-ft torque capacity) and **Peloquin LSD** (40% lockup under load) to handle the power spike without torque steer.

Replace the OEM **Audi MLB Evo** air suspension with **KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping, 40mm drop) + **034 Motorsport sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) and **H&R Sport Springs** (15mm drop) for flat cornering, paired with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect** tires (285/40R21 front, 295/35R21 rear) on **HRE FF04** forged wheels (21x9.5 ET35 front, 21x10.5 ET40 rear).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, 50mm wider track) with **custom Vorsteiner V-FF107 front splitter** (3D-molded, 3-stage adjustable) and **Maxton Design GT rear diffuser** (dual carbon fiber strakes, integrated tow hook).

**Lux HID 55W Bi-Xenon headlights** (6000K, CREE LED projectors) with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (5000K, 3000 lumen output) and **VLEDS 30-inch LED light bar** (mounted behind the grille, switchback amber/white).

**Full de-chrome treatment** via **3M Matte Black Vinyl Wrap** (2080 series, satin finish) with **blacked-out Audi rings** (Plasti-Dip, removable) and **custom Akrapović titanium exhaust tips** (dual 100mm, laser-etched "Q8 S" logo).
